detail: shipped MyReporter skeleton: deterministic ledger+dev-ledger digest (counts, decisions/ships verbatim, pending PRs), optional --summarize Engine prose (NoopEngine->digest-only), gh issue comment via Policy, kind=report ledger; ruff+pytest green (6 tests)

only 'post' writes the kind=report ledger entry (advancing the since-last-report window); 'digest' stays pure/read-only so dev-loop or CI prints don't silently advance the window and hide entries from the next authoritative report

runtime dep = mythings-core only (not my-guard): the sole side effect (gh issue comment) is ALLOW by default, so MyReporter defaults to a trivial allow-policy and accepts an injected Policy rather than taking a cross-tool dependency on my-guard

pending-PR detection is deterministic: a PR referenced in data.pr is pending unless its most-recent mentioning entry is kind=ship or outcome in {merged,shipped,closed}; documented since no canonical PR-resolved marker exists yet
